room.caption: [G5-4M] From that point, we really felt like a team, rather than a collection of random people playing Zephyr's game.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(49)
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh13MainA) metroidControl=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh13MetroidControl)

var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(505) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
